The 8th house is as much a house of life and death
as the lst. The dasa of the lord of the Sth house
generally eauses death of the relation from whom it is
8th.-For o<ample, the dasa of lord of lagna would be a
period for the death of the younger brothers or sisters of
mother. The dasa for ttre lord of the 2nd house may
bring about death of wife. That of the lord of 4th may
denote the death of father, 6th house may bring about
death of elder brothers and 8th house one's own death.
